article_title: Zyphra Releases ZAYA1-8B, a 760M-Active-Parameter Reasoning MoE Pretrained Entirely on a 1,024-GPU AMD MI300X Cluster
summary: Duplicate of already-published Zyphra ZAYA1-8B release article (PR #1190, merged earlier in this batch). The work is discarded under v3.9.0; not eligible for rewrite.

findings.details: Already-published article: src/content/articles/2026-05/08-zyphra-releases-zaya1-8b-an-84b-parameter-moe-reasoning-model-trained-end-to-end-on-1024-amd-mi300x-gpus.md (originally PR #1190). Same ZAYA1-8B release, same 760M active / 8.4B total parameter count, same 1,024 MI300X cluster, same May 6 2026 announcement.

content_preview.title: Zyphra Releases ZAYA1-8B, a 760M-Active-Parameter Reasoning MoE Pretrained Entirely on a 1,024-GPU AMD MI300X Cluster
content_preview.summary: Zyphra's open-weight ZAYA1-8B ships under Apache 2.0 with 89.1 on AIME'26 and 71.0 on GPQA-Diamond, trained end-to-end on AMD Instinct MI300X GPUs and IBM Cloud.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Zyphra released ZAYA1-8B on May 6, 2026, an open-weight reasoning mixture-of-experts model with under one billion active parameters that the San Francisco company says was pretrained entirely on AMD hardware, [according to a press release distributed via PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/zyphra-releases-zaya1-8b-a-reasoning-model-trained-on-amd-and-optimized-for-maximum-intelligence-density-per-parameter-302764700.html). The Hugging Face model card lists the mode...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).

editor_notes.content_quality: Substantively well-written. Different source set (PR Newswire + Hugging Face only) and uses the more specific 760M active / 8.4B total parameter count in the title. On its own merits would have been APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS for the loaded-language false-positive flag.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Same Zyphra ZAYA1-8B release facts as the already-published article.
recommendations: Bot operations: parallel write-article agents need topic-collision detection that includes in-flight submissions.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: REJECT under v3.9.0. PR #1190 covers this disclosure.
